creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to keerthana from comment #6)
> We observed the crash was still happening from same code which was given by aadhya,
> Is there any proper fix available for this issue?
FreeBSD 11 is EOL at September 30, 2021 and is no longer supported. Please upgrade to supported releases [1].

> Is this core obseverd in latest FreeBSD releases?
The fix should be in all supported releases. Please give it (the latest release) a try.

1. https://www.freebsd.org/security/#sup
